title: The Orbital Station
description: Re-light a dormant orbital relay. The relay only powers up in winter, demands proof of patience, and answers only to operators who have already decoded a master-key fragment.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Power lattice only fires in winter
Reach level 6 - the relay rejects junior operators
Carry a bazaar-pass from the cyber bazaar
Carry an archive-stamp from the forgotten archive
Build affinity 50 with the guide AI
Pass the relay logic puzzle (gamePlayed: logic)

hero.text: The relay bursts to full power. Three orbital lights answer in unison. You hear your own callsign echo back from the void.

saboteur.text: You re-route the relay to silent mode and pocket the starlight cell. The void exhales softly.

operator.text: You boot the relay, log the run, and step back. The console hums steady. Mission complete.
